channel.title: AI Skills & Tools
channel.description: Recent content on AI Skills & Tools

item.title: DebugInn Skill Tool
item.description: A starter kit for building your own Skill card — from design tools to page layout — and a guided flow to let Claude install the Skill for you.

item.title: DebugInn Skill Tool
item.description: 使用 debuginn-skill-tool，一句指令让 Claude 凭借 skill 在 hugo-theme-skills 主题网站上生成你的专属工具页面。
